items.summary: Revise the World Travel popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., section groupings, spacing, dividers), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

Revise the Time Zone popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., timezone list formatting, offset display, section groupings), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

Revise the Global Control popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., control groupings, labeled sections, consistent spacing), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.
